1746830.name: Sailing Stone
1746830.description:
Sailing Stone

3D roller arcade-style indie game.

  • Hop and Roll your way.
Avoid obstacles through 50 levels as fast as possible.

  • Try to beat the high score.
Become number one on the leaderboard.

  • Endless entertainment.
Each level is created by a procedural generation.

  • Make your way through 50 different levels.
There are 5 types of biomes: Desert, Plains, Forest, Canyon, and Snow. 10 levels in each world.

  • Find the best ways to exploit the game.

You can save and load your game, you have lives along the way, and the ability to respawn.

  • The difficulty is incremental.

You go faster and faster with each level and cannot stop until you reach the end of a level.
Procedural generation is getting more and more intense.
1746830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
